metadata.description: Dedicated authority-aware documentation inspection, mapping, objective checking, and export over repo-local docs roots.
metadata.summary: Inspect, map, check, and export governed documentation posture with a dedicated deterministic CLI.
metadata.author: Elegy Contributors

capabilities.name: Initialize Documentation Config
capabilities.description: Initialize .elegy/docs.yaml with authority roots, entrypoints, derived surfaces, and freshness defaults for the current repo. Supports dry-run.

parameters.name: project
parameters.description: Repository root to initialize or inspect.

parameters.name: correlation_id
parameters.description: Correlation ID for machine-safe command tracing.

parameters.name: dry_run
parameters.description: When true, preview init behavior without writing the config file.

output.description: Init result envelope including config posture plus created and skipped paths.

capabilities.name: Inspect Documentation Authority
capabilities.description: Inspect documentation authority roots, entrypoints, and derived surfaces for a repo without changing files.

parameters.name: correlation_id
parameters.description: Optional correlation ID for machine tracing.

output.description: Documentation authority map envelope with entrypoints, classified documents, and recommended reading order.

capabilities.name: Map Documentation Corpus
capabilities.description: Map repo-local documentation into current, planning, research, generated, and other classes with derived-surface drift state.

parameters.name: correlation_id
parameters.description: Optional correlation ID for machine tracing.

output.description: Documentation authority map envelope with entrypoints, classified documents, and recommended reading order.

capabilities.name: Check Documentation Objectively
capabilities.description: Run objective documentation checks for metadata, authority/status alignment, parseable dates, internal links, freshness warnings, and export drift.

parameters.name: correlation_id
parameters.description: Optional correlation ID for machine tracing.

output.description: Documentation validation envelope with checked documents, derived surfaces, and objective findings.

capabilities.name: Export LLMs View
capabilities.description: Render a deterministic non-authoritative llms.txt style export over the current documentation map.

parameters.name: output
parameters.description: Output path for the rendered export.

parameters.name: correlation_id
parameters.description: Optional correlation ID for machine tracing.

output.description: Documentation export envelope with export kind, output path, source counts, and authority posture.

capabilities.name: Export Documentation Bundle
capabilities.description: Render a deterministic non-authoritative JSON bundle over the current documentation map.

parameters.name: output
parameters.description: Output path for the rendered bundle.

parameters.name: correlation_id
parameters.description: Optional correlation ID for machine tracing.

output.description: Documentation export envelope with export kind, output path, source counts, and authority posture.

constraints.description: Validation stays objective: metadata, statuses, links, dates, freshness warnings, and export drift only. The surface does not score prose quality or rewrite documents.
Generated llms and bundle exports remain derived outputs. Source documents and governed config stay authoritative.

triggers.description: When an agent needs the best authority-aware map of repo documentation.
When repo docs need classification into current, planning, research, and derived surfaces.
When documentation needs metadata, link, freshness, and drift validation without subjective scoring.
